text: Artificial intelligence is changing many parts of our lives, from how we work to how we make decisions. However, developing AI responsibly requires careful thought about ethics. One key concern is bias, which can happen if the data used to train AI is not diverse, leading to unfair outcomes. Fairness and privacy are also important. We must ensure AI respects people’s rights and does not collect unnecessary personal data. Transparency is crucial too—users should know how AI systems make choices and why. By focusing on these principles, developers can create technology that is both useful and trustworthy. Responsible AI development benefits everyone in society.
